transcription.text: Valley Auto Care, this is Diego. Hi, do you guys work on European cars? I have a 2019 BMW X3 that needs some work. Absolutely, we work on all makes and models. What's going on with it? The check engine light is on and it's running rough. Okay, we'd start with a diagnostic. Do you want to schedule something? Not yet, I'm still calling around. But I'll keep you in mind. Sounds good, give us a call when you're ready.
